overview: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati), established in 1994, is a premier IIT known for its academic excellence and vibrant campus. It offers top-tier programs across engineering, design, sciences, and interdisciplinary fields, with notable strengths in computing, electronics, and design.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance; NAAC 'A' accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹1,00,000 per semester for General/OBC (income > ₹5 lakh). Income-based and caste-based waivers apply. Additional ~₹43,900 per semester for hostel, mess, and other charges.
₹15,000 per semester (Regular). Sponsored: ₹30,000. SC/ST/PwD: Tuition exempted. Other charges ~₹43,900.

placements.companiesVisited: Google, Microsoft, Qualcomm, Texas Instruments, Bajaj, Goldman Sachs, HPCL, Navi, Piramal

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on national-level exams followed by JoSAA or COAP counseling or institute-level selection.
admissions.importantDates: Follows JoSAA/COAP timelines and institute's academic calendar.

campus.specialNote: Semester charges (~₹43,900) include mess, hostel, exam, medical, and welfare fees. One-time admission fees ~₹10,800 + ₹12,000 caution deposit.

contact.address: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati, Guwahati – 781039, Assam, India
